task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Bahmni.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen, app menu, or clinical dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the clinical record for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or consultation page is open, displaying the name 'Priya Patel' and/or the identifier 'BAH000005'.

task_completion.description: Verify the primary diagnosis of Malaria is entered with the correct certainty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the diagnosis entry section, 'Malaria' is selected or typed, with the order set to 'Primary' and certainty set to 'Confirmed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the secondary diagnosis of Anaemia is entered with the correct certainty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the diagnosis entry section, 'Anaemia' is selected or typed, with the order set to 'Secondary' and certainty set to 'Confirmed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagnoses are saved to the patient's medical record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save confirmation message (toast notification) is visible, or the diagnoses appear in the saved consultation notes/visit summary as recorded.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser displaying the Bahmni application is visible, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Bahmni clinical application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shows standard Bahmni/OpenMRS UI elements (menus, patient headers, clinical forms) rather than a text editor or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the designated diagnosis form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Diagnoses are entered into the structured diagnosis form (utilizing autocomplete/dropdowns for name, order, and certainty) rather than being typed as plain text into a generic notes or observation field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Priya Patel. Patient ID: BAH000005. Primary Diagnosis: Malaria (Order: PRIMARY, Certainty: CONFIRMED). Secondary Diagnosis: Anaemia (Order: SECONDARY, Certainty: CONFIRMED). Both diagnoses are valid OpenMRS/Bahmni concepts and must be recorded using the structured diagnosis entry fields in the Bahmni Clinical app.
